answers: Hiking basics: start with short easy trails, wear proper shoes, bring water (1L per hour), snacks, and a map.
Essential hiking gear: good boots, moisture-wicking clothing, backpack, water, first aid kit, sun protection, and a trail map.
Hiking safety: tell someone your plan, check weather, stay on marked trails, start early, and know your limits.
Prepare for hiking: break in your boots first, build stamina with walks, pack layers, and always carry more water than you think.
